error_signature: Python not available for NodeCode execution
title: Python not available in NodeCode with Docker setup
symptom: When trying to use Python in NodeCode within n8n, it indicates that Python is not available for execution.
applies_when: Attempting to execute Python code in NodeCode
not_this_if: Using a different setup method (e.g., local installation)
root_cause: Starting from n8n version 2, an external task runner is required to execute Python code. The default Docker setup in the starter kit does not include this external task runner, leading to the unavailability of Python for NodeCode.
fix_steps: Modify the Docker Compose file to include the external task runner.
Add the necessary environment variables for the task runner.
Use the n8nio/runners image as specified in the external task runner documentation.
Restart the Docker containers to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update your Docker setup to include the external task runner for Python execution.
